Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 433}Hey, boy. Yer a handsome fella, aren't ya? You look just like one of my masks... I'm just kiddin'![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 433}Masks are actually good luck items, y'know? Like this one, for example... Uh, where did I put it...?[n]{f 1 1}
